subject: Why Americans lost faith in Washington
body:
It’s little wonder why 77 percent of Americans across the political spectrum disapprove of Congress’ job performance, according to the latest... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=013611eb3d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 23, 2019
---
| | |
# **Why Americans lost faith in Washington **

**It’s little wonder** why 77 percent of Americans across the political spectrum disapprove of Congress’ job performance, according to the latest survey from Gallup.

**On January 3** , Rep. Nancy Pelosi (D-CA) took over as Speaker of the House for the second time in her career. In the four and a half months since, Americans have gotten another close look at what career politicians do best: anything but solve real problems.

**For more than two years,** Congressional Democrats excused inaction by attacking President Donald J. Trump every day for a crime he _did not commit_. The Mueller Report—a 400-page document that cost American taxpayers at least $35 million—recommended no charges against the President. That should have ended the matter.
🎬 **Press Secretary Sarah Sanders:** [“At some point . . . it’s time to move on.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=de822bb478&e=3ee4985eea)
**Instead** , **Democrats** have a new obstruction strategy: weaponize the subpoena powers of Congress to fish for political ammunition to use against the Trump Administration.

**It’s a cynical ploy** and a dangerous precedent, but cynical ploys make for good TV drama. So while President Trump asks Congressional Democrats to set politics aside and work with him on infrastructure, immigration, stronger trade deals, and more, Democrat leaders know they can keep the media focused on political theater, not policy.

**Washington loves** the distraction tactic because it works in the short-term. The mainstream media always plays along, and it denies any accomplishments or progress that could risk making an opponent look good. The price tag—broken trust—comes later.

**Here is the real cost** of Washington’s never-ending obstruction drama:
* Today, _4 percent_ of Americans say they have a great deal of trust in Congress.

* In 2016, Americans’ confidence in mass media hit its lowest level in history.

* Between 1958 and 2015, public trust in Washington plunged from 73 to 18 percent.

**Congress now has a decision** : perpetuate the cycle of broken promises, or put aside the stunts and work with President Trump on areas of bipartisan agreement. What Democrats choose to do next will shape Americans’ faith in Washington for a generation.

[Watch: Democrat leaders face a choice, Press Secretary Sarah Sanders says](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=106b76b18f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **First Lady visits** **wounded warriors at Walter Reed**

**Yesterday,** First Lady Melania Trump traveled to Walter Reed National Military Medical Center to spend time with wounded American service members.

**She****had the honor** of presenting the Purple Heart to a wounded warrior recently injured in combat. The service member’s family was on hand to witness the moment. “I want to thank the service members I met today,” Mrs. Trump said. “As each of them recovers, we are reminded of the cost of our country’s security.”

**Americans are grateful** for that sacrifice, she added. “The President and I will always stand with our men and women in uniform.”

[In photos: First Lady Melania Trump visits Walter Reed Medical Center](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e50216b24b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump stands up for America’s farmers**

**Today,** President Trump took more action to defend our Nation’s farming community. In the face of China’s years-long trade war on America, the President has authorized the Department of Agriculture to provide up to $16 billion to support America’s farmers.

**“****We’re taking swift action** to remedy all of the injustice that’s been done over the years,” the President said today, and “will help keep our cherished farms thriving.”

[See how President Trump is fighting harder for farmers than any president before.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=970b81a5a6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

* * *
Team,

Communities across the country are being ripped apart by the opioid crisis.

We know that pharmaceutical companies lied about the addictive impacts of opioids they manufactured.

They knew how dangerous these products were but refused to tell doctors or patients.

Multi-billion-dollar pharmaceutical companies and their executives reaped large profits for years while their questionable marketing and distribution practices created a devastating public health crisis.

[Enough is enough.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba29b/134673f2/3da73ea/6996e1b0/3849872892/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/Big-Pharma?source=EM_PET_B2_052319_AC&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

Michael introduced the Opioid Crisis Accountability and Results Act to:

\-- Prohibit illegal marketing and distribution of opioids.
\-- Create criminal liability for top company executives.
\-- Penalize drug manufacturers who illegally advertise, market or distribute opioids.
\-- Require drug makers to reimburse the country for the negative economic impact of their products.

It is far past time for Congress to ensure opioid manufacturers, distributors, and executives fund our response to the crisis they created.

This bill will support programs that combat the opioid crisis and ensure we hold companies and their executives accountable for any future misconduct.

---

| | **I'm writing you a long email. Please take a minute to read it to the end --[_then I hope you 'll consider giving $15 to fund the next critical phase of my campaign. >>_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd25/3eb3e2fc/4fd39a7b/74499f2c/948964646/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190523_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")** People who grew up where I did...

Who were raised by single moms like I was...

Who come from a family of immigrants like I do...

We're not supposed to run for President -- and we're certainly not supposed to be serious contenders.

**But you just launched my campaign to the front of the pack and proved every single one of those stereotypes wrong.**

Because of you, we just shocked the world and became one of the candidates to hit the donor threshold for the first Democratic debates!

Now, I'm building the next phase of my campaign. I'm staffing up in early states. Traveling the country. Releasing bold policies. Launching ads to share my ideas.
[_**But I 'll be honest: It's going to take a lot more resources to fund my campaign's expansion. Can I count on your $15 before midnight? >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd25/3eb3e2fc/4fd39a7b/74499f2c/948964646/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190523_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") [**CONTRIBUTE >>**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd25/3eb3e2fc/4fd39a7b/74499f2c/948964646/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190523_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") Just one last thing before I let you go. This is crucial.

I need you to know how much I truly appreciate everything you've done to turn this campaign from an underdog race into a serious contender.

When the press counted me out.

When the establishment said I was a longshot.

When the far-right said no one like me could ever be President.

**You believed in me, and you had my back. You have no idea how much that means.**

I hope I can count on your support as we continue to build this historic movement together.

name: Juan Rodriguez, kamalaharris.org
subject: I have to ask
body:
I’m emailing to ask you to
pitch in to help elect Kamala. Anything you’re able to give right now
makes a difference. Let me tell you why.

As Kamala’s campaign manager, I get an update on our fundraising numbers
more times in a day than I care to admit. I have to, because I need to
make sure we’re making the targeted, smart investments it takes to build a
winning campaign.

That also means I’m constantly looking for ways to make every dollar
stretch. So we can hire more regional organizers on the ground, build up
our grassroots network in the early states, and plan more events where
voters can hear from Kamala directly.

Here’s the deal though. No
matter how you slice it, contributions we receive through emails like this
one make up a big percentage of our operating budget. The math just
doesn’t lie. All of us -- Kamala included -- count on you to make our
campaign run.

Right now, we’re not on pace to reach our May grassroots fundraising goal.
That’s why I’m asking you right now: Can you make
a contribution of any amount to make
sure we reach this target?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190523-eom?refcode=ema190523-eom5-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1006&refcode2=5087_5755789_M-I9XS&akid=5087%2E5755789%2EM-I9XS ]Another Amount

I’m going to be honest: if our fundraising numbers don’t pick up
significantly before May is over, I’ll have to make some decisions about
where we can cut back.

I don’t want to do that. Every single line item in the June budget
proposal sitting on my desk right now can make a difference between
winning and losing this race.

That’s just the reality of this election. The primary field is crowded
with 23 Democrats running for president, and President Trump has already
raised over $90 million for his campaign war chest. When Kamala wins the
Democratic primary, we’ll have a lot of catching up to do to beat Trump.

We can’t come up short on this goal, because we’re laying the foundation for
a campaign that takes us through November 2020 and elects Kamala. I
wouldn’t ask if it weren’t so important.

Grassroots
supporters like you
power this campaign. If you can step up your investment in our movement to
elect Kamala, please pitch in right now:

As Kamala’s campaign manager, I get an update on our fundraising numbers more times in a day than I care to admit. name: Chair Mary Mancini
subject: Here’s what your tax dollars are paying for
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
Dear Peter

You’ve probably seen it in the news, but we’ll break it down:

Tennessee House Speaker Glen Casada used your tax dollars to pay a Republican digital advertising consultant to slander and attack Rep. David Byrd’s sexual abuse victims.

Casada’s disgraced chief-of-staff, who resigned after he admitted to doing cocaine in the Capitol building and sending racist and sexist text, will receive an additional $32,000 of vacation pay from the Tennessee taxpayers.

Casada recently announced his plan to resign -- but not until he returns from vacation in June so he can rake in an extra $3,039.50 of his House Speaker salary.

Casada spent $46,000 taxpayer dollars to renovate his Capitol office, including $11,000 on a white noise machine.

The harsh reality is that had the media not exposed who Casada truly is, these abuses of taxpayer dollars would’ve continued for years because House Republicans would’ve helped cover up every single act of misconduct.

While Republicans’ only priority is for this entire scandal to blow over as quickly as possible, it’s our job to shine light on these wrongdoings and propel Democrats who are committed to restoring integrity to our legislature.

And I’ll be frank -- that depends on support from people like you. Can you donate $25 today to amplify our message of honest and accountable government?

Small-dollar donors are the driving force behind our work and the greatest threat to politicians like Glen Casada who believe public service is a game that can be manipulated for personal gain.

Thank you for your support.

Mary

--

Mary Mancini

Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Lara Henderson
subject: Kirsten is absolutely barnstorming Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
body:
She's already visited nearly every corner of Iowa, including many of the rural or red counties other candidates haven't gone to.
| | |
---
Peter, Kirsten arrives in Iowa today!
She's here this whole weekend for events and will be back the next two weekends in June, too--**completely barnstorming the state!****** She's already visited nearly every corner of Iowa, including many of the rural or red counties other candidates haven't gone to.
It's so important Kirsten visits Iowa as much as possible during these summer months. Now is the time when connecting with caucus-goers will help us build momentum and support going into the caucuses in February, which is a critical test of a candidate's viability.
And I've seen it over and over again...when Kirsten gets in a room with people, she wins hearts and minds.
**[Can you make a donation right now to help keep Kirsten coming back to Iowa more and more this summer and fall? It will be CRUCIAL to growing our program here in the first-in-the-nation state.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9773a2/2ae112ef/6864dfb1/357c7276/1806451925/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxMTItZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3112-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Of course, as much as I'd love it, Kirsten can't be here _every_ __ weekend.
So we're also focused on building out a robust field program on the ground here that can continue to connect with caucus-goers even when she's not in town.
We've already opened one Iowa office and are closing in on a second. We're staffing up so we can make sure to send volunteers and organizers to all the must-do events and connect with as many caucus-goers as possible.
We want to have a super strong team built out here to support Kirsten when she visits and keep up the momentum even when she's away.
I'm so pumped for Kirsten to crisscross Iowa this month. I hope you are too.
**Support Kirsten 's campaign by chipping in today--your donation will help keep her coming back to Iowa and grow our program here:**
**[secure.actblue.com/donate/kg-email](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f9773a2/2ae112ef/6864dfb1/357c7276/1806451925/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxMTItZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3112-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for everything,

Lara Henderson

name: Team Hood
subject: Lives are at risk
body:
|
---
Friend,

**Rural health care in Mississippi is in crisis.**

Over the past several years, _five_ rural hospitals have closed and _dozens_ of rural hospitals face major financial problems.

Lives are being put at risk -- but it doesn't have to be this way.

Because of partisan politics, Mississippi has turned down over **$1 billion per year** in federal support that would keep rural hospitals open.

Jim Hood thinks Mississippians need and deserve affordable health care. That's why Jim supports taking federal support to keep rural hospitals open and extend health coverage to over _300,000_ Mississippians. This will also create thousands of medical jobs and pump badly needed funding into rural communities.

[**If you support keeping rural hospitals open and expanding health coverage to uninsured Mississippians, add your name to sign our petition.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/TcVSNzNaRh0iA12b0Iam2bU7-tMpxCbdcrG0udtKEq8=/yWGGwnJ3Ot64vtU0FKUvb99RCua3wH2kO1lysrz6yoo=)

Thank you,
Team Hood

Let us remember the service of our veterans, and let us renew our national promise to fulfill our sacred obligations to our veterans and their families who have sacrificed so much so that we can live free. Throughout my career, I’ve always supported our service members and veterans and I believe that we must do everything possible to take care of them. Here’s just some of what I’ve fought for in Congress: More funding and better treatment at VA medical centers Jobs and business opportunities for our recently returning service members A chance for veterans to share their stories through the Veterans History Project Finding and bringing our fallen service members home from foreign battlefields for respectful burials But there’s still more progress that needs to be made. Thanks for joining me to support the brave men and women who defend our country. Happy Memorial Day weekend. name: Megan West
subject: He’s riding a bicycle for 33 days across America
body:
| | Hi Peter, Can you imagine riding a bicycle for 3000 miles and doing it in 33 days? Neil Tomba, Senior Pastor of Northwest Bible Church in Dallas, Texas will be cycling across the United States where, along the way, he intends to engage in conversations about faith and Jesus with individuals from all walks of life. His “Conversations Coast to Coast” campaign is expected to become a documentary film to inspire others. I had the opportunity to talk with Pastor Neil about his upcoming adventure and why this 18-year-old dream is now coming to fruition. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kwsVGt8ELOpWZhY0_uD2U4g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190524com01&n=1) In a culture that is losing the ability to have respectful and honest conversations, especially about faith, Pastor Neil shares valuable insights to encourage each of us to learn what we can do better when engaging those around us in conversation, which can ultimately show that having a conversation about Jesus brings joy. [Watch our conversation](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kwsVGt8ELOpWZhY0_uD2U4g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190524com01&n=2) and then [join along with Pastor Neil](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=xTgkZ9kb8RUuoW1DpnjFnJ1qgXuVQV6S8nE7Fe9RY8g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190524com01&n=3), starting May 27, for 33 days as he cycles across the country. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kwsVGt8ELOpWZhY0_uD2U4g&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190524com01&n=4) **United. We Stand.**

Megan West
Media Host and Director
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190524com01&n=5)
---

[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190524com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190524com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190524com01&n=9)

subject: Our Journey Has Begun
body:
**
------------------------------------------------------------

** Kicking Off the Campaign
------------------------------------------------------------

This past Saturday, I officially kicked off my campaign for Congress at Houston’s well-known local venue, the Raven Tower. The turnout was invigorating; curious members of our community came out, as well as friends and family from all over the state. The support was staggering and inspiring.

We had quite a few neighbors donate money and offer support, but we’re just getting started. In order to reach our objectives, we are going to need your support as well. The need for volunteers is greater now than ever - sign up for a block walk today (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=41b6c09e06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_05_24_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-41b6c09e06-32267927) !

Volunteer today! (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=41b6c09e06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_05_24_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-41b6c09e06-32267927)

Our success starts with you! Take a moment to donate to my campaign by clicking here (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=41b6c09e06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_05_24_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-41b6c09e06-32267927) . The only way to win is if we all come together to bring about a difference. Let’s raise our voices in a coalition of reformation, and work together to do better for our city.

Donate here! (http://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=41b6c09e06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_05_24_02_39&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-41b6c09e06-32267927)

Finally, share this email with friends and family, and be sure you are liking, commenting, and sharing our posts on social media. The most impactful way to achieve name recognition is by word of mouth, so tell your friends, tell your family, tell your co-workers, and spread the word. It’s up to you now!

Thank you for all of your support thus far; every bit is just as important as the last.

Best wishes,

Marc Flores

name: DWS for Congress
subject: bodily sovereignty
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | What Republicans across the country are doing is a direct attack on women's sovereignty over their own bodies. We have to fight back. **_[See below, and please sign on right away in support of reproductive rights.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113dbc/622b7b5b/1fa64b43/307b2e74/2782984661/VEsH/ "http://www.paction.us/abortion_bans/dws-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+See+below+and+please+sign+on+right+away+&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190524_1_2&source=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190524_1_2")_**

\--- Original Message ---

Friend, it's a dark time for women in this country.

State by state, we're seeing our reproductive rights put on the chopping block to score political points. These laws are the most restrictive we've ever seen. Just last week, the governor of Alabama signed a law that outlaws abortion after 6 weeks, before most women even know they're pregnant, with no exceptions for rape or incest.

It's more important than ever that we speak out. **_[Please sign on now to stand up for a woman's right to safe and accessible healthcare.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113dbc/622b7b5b/1fa64b43/307b2e77/2782984661/VEsE/ "http://www.paction.us/abortion_bans/dws-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=2+-+Please+sign+on+now+to+stand+up+for+a+wom&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190524_1_2&source=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190524_1_2")_**

[](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113dbc/622b7b5b/1fa64b43/307b2e76/2782984661/VEsF/ "http://www.paction.us/abortion_bans/dws-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190524_1_2&source=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190524_1_2")
Women are being used as political pawns. The GOP's goal is simple: they want to have a case challenged all the way up to the Supreme Court, where they hope Roe v. Wade will be overturned once and for all.

Absolutely no one should have a say over what a woman chooses to do with her own body. The idea that these so-called "legislative leaders" feel entitled to dictate reproductive choices is harrowing, and we have to do everything in our power to protect the reproductive rights the generations before us fought so hard to secure.

**_[Please, join me in standing up for reproductive rights. Sign on now.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113dbc/622b7b5b/1fa64b43/307b2e69/2782984661/VEsC/ "http://www.paction.us/abortion_bans/dws-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=4+-+Please+join+me+in+standing+up+for+reprod&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190524_1_2&source=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190524_1_2")_**

Thank you,

Debbie

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: New Video “Service”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Growing up with my dad walking through the door every evening with fatigues on was a prime example of what it meant to give back to this country......
Friend,

Growing up with my dad walking through the door every evening with fatigues on was a prime example of what it meant to give back to this country. It really is no surprise that my sister, brother and I all went to West Point.

My parents taught us that nothing in life is free. When you live in the greatest country in the world, it is your duty to give back.
_[Watch “Service”](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=d35e1679d9504f7591b4a0c9b5646ba7&_e=yauceutPguo9PBbSiC4EQRquFgZ0-9ymtJR3olxF_UKTOdJUpv11g3Ojl1E2z4RkDkNl9GrE9jR2T1brKfWRMgPR8s1zAMmhZu8XVUy4anuL1veWE1eq3NCG7lg-PtCnRTTtvgAxPLPjGWDFRcQipwJKuR2hViZY031Cv_M_yv_wEq_8LMVfsxJPSlSmOmx0t5SG4Dyr_t1KqppkndkHxh04zUUUf6fLkMn6EZqpuECXhUD33tcpTwGRN4EOZuAbbIPuiG7hDcNnyYdxMpUv4A%3D%3D)_
Strapped into an Apache helicopter, I flew 55 combat missions over Iraq, each time knowing it could be my last. I did it because I believe in the values of this country, and I believe in my heart that we live in the greatest country in the history of the world.

I am running for Congress because I want to continue my service and defend our way of life. The one thing that sets military men and women apart is the idea of putting the country first. It’s not about getting re-elected. It’s about serving, getting results and completing the mission.

As we head into Memorial Day weekend, let’s put politics aside and come together to honor generations of brave Americans who made the ultimate sacrifice, and rededicate ourselves to strengthening this great country they fought and died for.

Sincerely,

Wesley

subject: We risk falling behind

body:
Here is the simple truth
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1451%2E150750%2EmZVSSw)

Friends -
Here is the simple truth:
It’s going to be hard to catch up to Joe Biden’s fundraising. He is raising huge sums of money at large fundraising events all across the country.
And these are not grassroots fundraising events. These are high-dollar functions hosted and attended by corporate lobbyists, health care executives, a Republican casino-CEO, and a union-busting lawyer among others.
And the totals are staggering: $700,000 in a few hours at an event in Pennsylvania. Almost $1.5 million at two events in Florida.
And if we have any chance of catching up, it will be because lots and lots and lots of people like you step up and make a number of small contributions to our campaign. In short, you are our only chance.
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to our campaign today? We need your help to close this fundraising gap before our next fundraising deadline. This is so important.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/11505?refcode=em190524-1-60&t=26&akid=1451%2E150750%2EmZVSSw)
The truth of the matter is that the American people are pretty sick and tired of the billionaire class of this country buying up our candidates and our elections.
We can win elections without begging those people for money. And, indeed, we are more likely to win with a candidate who does not.
All my best,
Faiz Shakir
Campaign Manager

subject: They died on our watch:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2ab39/6cd27893/4c6a7d3f/158039e3/4154565140/VEsH/ "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Six young lives snuffed out. Six immigrant children, dead on our watch. **The latest: a 10-year-old girl from El Salvador died in U.S. custody last year. It was unreported until now. ** The heart of this shame, this national tragedy: Donald Trump's cruel immigration policies and the child prison camps run in our name. **I visited a camp in Homestead, Florida, earlier this year. It was chilling and part of a system that stems from the administration 's strategy of criminalizing flight from oppression.** **[Let's restore basic humanity: tell Congress to shut down Donald Trump's massive, unregulated, for-profit Homestead prison camp once and for all.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2ab39/6cd27893/4c6a7d3f/158039e0/4154565140/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/shut-down-child-prisons/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-05-shut-down-child-prisons-email")** We should be doing everything we can to get these children back into loving homes. Not locking them up in systems that can't adequately care for them. Team Trump needs to quit treating migrants as criminals, quit trying to inflict trauma on children as a strategy of deterrence, and ensure that every child with an asylum claim is treated in a dignified and decent manner while they await their asylum hearing. How many more children will suffer? How many more have died that we don't know about? These questions keep me up at night, and should be at the heart of a national debate. [**Sign my petition: tell Congress to shut down the Homestead child prison camp immediately.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2ab39/6cd27893/4c6a7d3f/158039e0/4154565140/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/shut-down-child-prisons/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-05-shut-down-child-prisons-email") _Jeff_ [Sign the Petition](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2ab39/6cd27893/4c6a7d3f/158039e0/4154565140/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://www.jeffmerkley.com/petition/shut-down-child-prisons/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-05-shut-down-child-prisons-email") |

name: Our Revolution
subject: People being represented by anti-choice Democrats deserve competitive primaries without the DCCC putting its thumb on the scale of democracy. Having a (D) next to your name does nothing to protect the rights of women whose constitutional right to an abortion is under attack.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Last month, Our Revolution Illinois hand-delivered tens of thousands of your signatures directly to Rep. Cheri Bustos in Chicago to protest the DCCC Blacklist.
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4c8/bed43eb/95b5da2b/75fa9380/2769831890/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Friends,
Last month, Our Revolution Illinois hand-delivered tens of thousands of your signatures directly to Rep. Cheri Bustos in Chicago to protest the DCCC Blacklist. She promised us a follow-up meeting to discuss reforming this undemocratic policy which favors incumbents over progressive challengers.
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4c8/bed43eb/95b5da2b/75fa9383/2769831890/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dccc-blacklist-petition?refcode=em190524-snd&noskip=true")
Clem Balanoff (left), leader of Our Revolution Chicago, with Richard Rodriguez, National Board Member of Our Revolution delivering petitions to DCCC Chair Cheri Bustos in Chicago.
But here's the problem - Rep. Bustos just backed out the meeting with Our Revolution leaders. Not only did she cancel our meeting, Rep. Bustos also announced that the DCCC was going to continue to throw big dollar fundraisers for incumbents like Rep. Dan Lipinski, an anti-choice member of Congress who opposes Medicare for All - even though there are real progressive champions running to oppose him.
This week, after we announced we were going to protest the fundraiser, Bustos withdrew her involvement - this is a victory, but crucially, she maintained that the DCCC could offer Lipinski financial support to defeat primary challengers.
[**We need leaders who care more about policy than party affiliation. That 's why Our Revolution is lifting up progressive candidates even if it means taking on incumbent Democrats. Will you help us continue the fight against the DCCC Blacklist by chipping in $5 today?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4c8/bed43eb/95b5da2b/75fa9383/2769831890/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dccc-blacklist-petition?refcode=em190524-snd&noskip=true")
Being a Democrat who opposes _Roe v. Wade_ doesn't reflect the values that the Democratic Party claims to uphold.
Being a Democrat who opposes Medicare for All doesn't help 30 million people without health insurance and the millions more who are underinsured.
It's not just Lipinski, and it's not just on issues of women's choice and health care.
Being a Democrat who takes money from the fossil fuel industry doesn't help us transform our energy system to save us from environmental catastrophe.
Being a Democrat who takes money from Wall Street doesn't help working people who are being ripped off by corporate shareholders.
[**We are fighting to transform the Democratic Party, elect progressive champions and win the policies that will change people 's lives, but we cannot do this work without you. Pitch in $5 to help us fight for the political revolution today by overturning the DCCC Blacklist.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a4c8/bed43eb/95b5da2b/75fa9383/2769831890/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dccc-blacklist-petition?refcode=em190524-snd&noskip=true")
In Solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Americans Don't Want Impeachment, but Democrats aren't Listening
body:
"The American people are sending a pretty clear message to Washington: They are sick and tired of the investigations into President Trump..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8df74013d4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Americans Don't Want Impeachment, but Democrats aren't Listening**

“The American people are sending a pretty clear message to Washington: They are sick and tired of the investigations into President Trump and don't want Democrats in Congress to impeach him. But the Democrats aren't listening,” Marc Thiessen writes in Fox News.

“A Harvard-Harris poll finds that 65 percent of Americans say Congress should not begin impeachment proceedings against Trump. Sixty percent agree with Attorney General William Barr that ‘the facts and public actions of President Trump did not amount to obstruction of justice, especially since there was no underlying collusion.’”

“And 58 percent believe that ‘Given the Mueller report ... we should turn the page on investigations of President Trump.’”

[Click here to read more](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a01541844b&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “If there’s anyone left in America who actually believes Democratic Party leaders are interested in constructive dialogue with President Trump on substantive policy issues like infrastructure, I have a Russian conspiracy theory to sell them,” David Harsanyi writes in the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ce7c6e206b&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Don’t buy that Pelosi and Schumer are outraged. They’re loving the status quo. It allows them to use congressional oversight investigations as a cudgel to push for a sham public impeachment, undermining Trump’s political agenda. When useful, however, they can also demand Trump meet with them in good faith to hash out deals their party finds useful. There is absolutely no reason for the president to play along.”
---
|
---
| “Congressional Democrats are dangerously close to undercutting U.S. national security for the sake of scoring political points against President Trump. Shame on them,” Quin Hillyer writes in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2a63c7afad&e=3ee4985eea)_. For members of Congress to slanderously “accuse the secretaries of state and defense, the national security adviser, and the president of dishonesty in furtherance of warmongering, while not even bothering to offer words of condemnation against evil enemies such as the Iranian government, is to undercut U.S. forces at a crucial time.”
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump has directed the heads of several government agencies to cooperate with Attorney General William Barr’s investigation of the origins of the Russia probe. In a memo sent out Thursday, Trump also authorized Barr to declassify documents related to the Russia investigation,” Chuck Ross reports in _[The Daily Caller](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=427dade027&e=3ee4985eea)_. Yesterday’s action “will help ensure that all Americans learn the truth about the events that occurred, and the actions that were taken, during the last Presidential election and will restore confidence in our public institutions,” White House Press Secretary Sarah Sanders said in a statement.
---
|
---
| “The New York federal judge who ruled on Wednesday that the Trump administration must comply with two subpoenas from the House Financial Services and Intelligence Committees has donated in the past to a slew of big-name Democrats -- including two who currently sit on those committees, according to federal election filings,” Gregg Re reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0477a1797b&e=3ee4985eea). “Judges have the option to recuse themselves if there is an appearance of bias,” but Barack Obama-appointed U.S. District Judge Edgardo Ramos chose not to.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8590d21b4e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fda4770df6&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ecb7f2f10f)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

We have great news, Peter!
| | We have great news, Peter!

Abigail was recently honored as a **Standout Freshman Representative** by the Town Hall Project, an organization focused on building accountability in government by fostering face-to-face conversations between constituents and their representatives.

We flipped an "unwinnable" district last year because we built a true grassroots campaign that engages with voters of all backgrounds and political identities.

**For Abigail, serving is no different. She is building real relationships so she can better understand how Washington can help Central Virginia families -- not special interests.**

Every voice that Abigail hears makes her a better, more accountable representative and advocate for VA-07. That's why she asked us to send around her 30-second priorities survey.

[**Peter, will you quickly tell Abigail what 's important to you and let her know what you want to see Congress do for Central Virginia? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/cQnUbphpvgFTmyP-YSzfU509l69eZfoDWR49uhyFcq4=/MmBbH5dM7kBzzIRRfg9_sxbb6U2M-F5yVW_esAh7J00=) | [BEGIN SURVEY »](https://act.myngp.com/el/cQnUbphpvgFTmyP-YSzfU509l69eZfoDWR49uhyFcq4=/MmBbH5dM7kBzzIRRfg9_sxbb6U2M-F5yVW_esAh7J00=)
---
Abigail understands that transparency and civic participation are the cornerstones of our democracy. To uphold these founding principles, she pledged to the constituents of VA-07 that she would hold a town hall in each of VA-07's ten counties in her first year.

**We 're only at the 5-month mark, and Abigail has already announced all ten town halls -- _and done six so far!_ That's in addition to numerous public events and "Coffee with your Congressperson" meetings she's hosted across the district. **

She's proven her commitment to Central Virginians, and now, she needs to hear from you.

[**Take Abigail 's two-question issues survey so she can bring the values and priorities of Central Virginians to Washington. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/cQnUbphpvgFTmyP-YSzfU509l69eZfoDWR49uhyFcq4=/MmBbH5dM7kBzzIRRfg9_sxbb6U2M-F5yVW_esAh7J00=)

Thanks for taking the time,

body:

| **_Momentum_**
Indiana is in a position of boundless momentum. Whether it’s on the racetrack – as we’ll see this weekend with the 103rd running of the Indy 500 – or it’s with our roads, our economy, our workforce development, our schools and so much more, Indiana is running at full speed ahead today. And a large part of that momentum is thanks to the boundless energy and leadership coming from our state’s chief executive, **Governor Eric Holcomb**.

If you’ve been to any event **Governor Holcomb’s** attending – ranging from a Lincoln Day dinner to a groundbreaking on new jobs coming to our state – you’ve seen that boundless energy up close. As I said in a recent interview with Howey Politics Indiana (you can read the [full story here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ae31b7084a&e=1acd9bb3d6)), “He puts people first and it’s consistent with his agenda theme. He tries to make the main thing the main thing. He’s just come through an important session with a lot of critical issues on the agenda and achieved a clean sweep across the board.”

And by making “the main thing the main thing,” Hoosiers are noticing in a big way. A recent poll released this month shows Hoosiers giving **Governor Holcomb** very strong marks for his job approval, with the poll’s analysis stating that "re-election looks all but guaranteed" and that "**Governor Holcomb** is on the cusp of running away with his own re-election” (you can [read about the poll here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5aa0e5a627&e=1acd9bb3d6)).

[That Howey Politics Indiana article](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2eace46b1c&e=1acd9bb3d6) I mentioned even went on to say that, “he’s in about as strong a position as an incumbent governor could find.”

I’m so thankful for **Governor Holcomb’s** leadership, and for Indiana’s momentum that just keeps on rolling.

-Kyle Hupfer

| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was **
---
|
---
| **_Honoring Our Military & Caregivers_** As Memorial Day approaches, this week**Governor Holcomb** dedicated time to spend with our veterans, military caregivers, and their families. On Wednesday, he joined **former U.S. Senator Elizabeth Dole** and **actor Tom Hanks** at Bankers Life Fieldhouse to celebrate and honor our nation’s hidden heroes, military caregivers. It was part of an event with the Elizabeth Dole Foundation, which brings attention to and helps seek solutions for the brave and selfless Americans who care for our military personnel and our veterans. Learn more about the [foundation’s great work here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=20a6db1957&e=1acd9bb3d6). **Governor Holcomb** also spent yesterday at Fort Harrison State Park to help send off motorcycle riders from Rolling Thunder Indiana Chapter #1 as they took off for Ride to the Wall. The group will travel to Washington, D.C. to support veterans rights and to honor our nation’s POW and MIA soldiers. Check out the [video of their send-off](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6026bca8e5&e=1acd9bb3d6) with **Governor Holcomb** here!
---
|

|
---
| | _**Honoring Those Who Serve**_ As we race into Memorial Day weekend (and Indy 500 weekend!), at the Indiana Republican Party we pause to reflect on those who currently serve our nation in uniform, those who have served, and those who have made the ultimate sacrifice. Thank you for your dedication to freedom. Several of our Indiana Republican elected officials are veterans. After they served in uniform, they came back home to help serve our state and are making a difference in the lives of Hoosiers each and every day.
* **Governor Holcomb** is a veteran of the U.S. Navy.
* **Senator Todd Young** is a Marine who has gone from fighting for Americans in uniform to fighting for Hoosiers in the U.S. Senate.
* **Congressman Jim Banks **is a U.S. Navy Reserve veteran who served in Afghanistan and is one of the most recently-deployed members of Congress.
* **Congressman Jim Baird** is a decorated Vietnam veteran and a recipient of a Bronze Star and two Purple Hearts.
* **Congressman Greg Pence** is also a Marine.
* **Congressman Larry Bucshon** also served in the U.S. Navy Reserve.
* And we have countless other veterans serving in the Indiana General Assembly and in our county and municipal governments statewide.

Thank you to those who serve – both for your time in uniform, and for your service here at home.

| _**Chairman Hupfer Joins RNC’s Budget Committee**_ This week, **Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer** was unanimously elected to serve on the Republican National Committee (RNC) Budget Committee, representing the Midwest! "Indiana is known as a leader in sound budgeting and strong balance sheets. I look forward to applying these Hoosier principles I've built over my career to our national party's budget going into a critical election year," said Hupfer. "In 2020, with record fundraising and smart fiscal management in place, I know that the RNC will help lead the way to another historic election for**President Donald J. Trump** and **Vice President Mike Pence**." As part of his role on the budget committee, he will be responsible for helping manage the national Republican Party's budget going into the 2020 election cycle, which will include budget planning for the 2020 Republican National Convention, battleground races and the presidential election. This is in addition to **Chairman Hupfer’s** role leading the Indiana Republican Party and his role as treasurer of the Eric Holcomb for Indiana campaign. Congrats,**Chairman Hupfer**!

| | We want to make sure you didn't miss Francis' message about John Katko's decision to side with payday lenders who make money by exploiting American soldiers with high-interest loans.

[**Add your name here to tell Katko that our troops are more important than the profits of his campaign donors.**](https://conole.bsd. "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/petition-katko-vote?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+here+to+tell+Katko+that+ou&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190524_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190524_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190524_1_2")

You can read Francis' note below for more details.

**Begin forwarded message:**

When I was serving my country in the Navy, I saw first-hand how predatory lenders took advantage of many of my fellow sailors with high-interest payday loans.

Predatory lenders shouldn't be allowed to trap our service members like this. But they get away with it with some help from politicians in Washington -- like **John Katko, who voted _against_ legislation that would have protected American soldiers and student loan borrowers from predatory lenders.**

[**Add your name to join me in telling Katko that there will be consequences for choosing to side with his special interest investors over what 's best for America.**](https://conole.bsd. "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/petition-katko-vote?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+to+join+me+in+telling+Katk&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190524_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190524_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190524_1_2") [Sign the petition](https://conole.bsd. "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/petition-katko-vote?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Sign+the+petition&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190524_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190524_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190524_1_2") Unlike D.C. politicians, I'm not afraid to call it as I see it: John Katko consistently prioritizes what's best for powerful interest groups over what's best for the American people.

That's why our mission to restore a democracy that works for the American people starts with electing leaders who will stand up to predatory lenders and special interests.

[**Sign here to let Katko know that we are sick and tired of D.C. politicians putting their special interest donors over what 's best for American soldiers.**](https://conole.bsd. "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/petition-katko-vote?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+Sign+here+to+let+Katko+know+that+we+are+&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190524_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190524_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190524_1_2")

Yours in service,

Francis

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This decision makes your support even more powerfully important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We have a real opportunity right now in a Democratic primary to build a campaign from the grassroots up. And our grassroots movement will be our big advantage. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fb7c/45c30650/9d614664/6699c8cd/3955485781/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
When we started this presidential campaign, I saw two options for how we could run it:
1. Focus on building a grassroots movement entirely with grassroots donors and volunteers.

2. Or spend a lot time with wealthy people behind closed doors, and then hope we have enough money to buy a bunch of TV ads right before voting starts.

For me, the choice was clear. I picked option #1.

Here's what that looks like: I'm not doing any high-dollar private fundraisers with millionaires and corporate executives.

I don't take any corporate PAC money, or PAC money of any kind. I don't take any Washington lobbyist money. And I'm not out sucking up to a bunch of billionaires hoping that they're going to run a Super PAC for me.

**[In other words, we're running this movement with grassroots donors and grassroots volunteers. That makes your support even more powerfully important. If you think this is the best way to run a campaign, we need you to be in this fight -- can you chip in right now?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fb7c/45c30650/9d614664/6699c8cf/3955485781/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTI0ZW0zLW5vLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190524em3-no-full")**

We have a real opportunity right now in a Democratic primary to build a campaign from the grassroots up.

And you know what? If we seize that opportunity, our grassroots movement will be our big advantage when we roll into the general election in 2020.

That means we'll get a better chance at winning the White House.

We'll be more ready to win up and down the ballot -- to keep the House, get control of the Senate, and take back more state houses. When you build from the grassroots, it helps everybody who's in the fight, not just in the presidential race.

Our grassroots movement will bring the energy we need to make big, structural change -- the change we need so that someone like the guy in the White House never gets elected president again.

**It 's the right way to run, and the best way to win. But person-to-person, face-to-face organizing takes real resources.

[So what do you say? Can you pitch in $3 or whatever you can afford so we can keep growing our movement? Side by side, you and me -- this is how we'll win.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fb7c/45c30650/9d614664/6699c8cf/3955485781/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTI0ZW0zLW5vLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190524em3-no-full")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fb7c/45c30650/9d614664/6699c8cf/3955485781/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW1heTE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTI0ZW0zLW5vLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-may19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190524em3-no-full")

| | | Team,

I know my campaign has been emailing a lot lately, and I wouldn't ask if it weren't so important, but we're at a pivotal moment for our country and our planet.

The Green New Deal sparked a revolution--one that is putting fear in the hearts of the fossil fuel industry across the country because people are taking notice, speaking up, and demanding change.

I'm leading the charge for massive job creation and to save our planet through the Green New Deal, but the right-wing media, the GOP, and the fossil fuel industry want to keep the status quo.

And that's why the attacks keep coming, and we must have the resources to fight back and win.
